title: BEM-690 continue agreement
objective:
Run script:
"""
sep='\n'
for d in ['governance/state','governance/reports','governance/codex/proofs','governance/transport','governance/audit_mailbox/gpt_to_claude','governance/agreements/active','governance/agreements/final','governance/protocols']:
    Path(d).mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
created='2026-05-19 | 05:48 (UTC+3)'

def read(path):
    p=Path(path)
    return p.read_text(errors='ignore') if p.exists() else ''

def find_responses():
    found=[]
    for d in [Path('governance/audit_mailbox/claude_to_gpt'),Path('governance/audit_mailbox/external_auditor_to_internal_auditor')]:
        if d.exists():
            for f in sorted(d.glob('*')):
                if f.is_file():
                    txt=read(f); low=(f.name+' '+txt).lower(); up=txt.upper()
                    if 'bem682' in low or 'bem-682' in low or 'final decision' in low or 'consolidated protocol' in low:
                        decision='UNKNOWN'
                        if 'DECISION: APPROVE' in up or 'APPROVE' in up:
                            decision='APPROVE'
                        elif 'CHANGE_REQUIRED' in up:
                            decision='CHANGE_REQUIRED'
                        elif 'BLOCKED' in up:
                            decision='BLOCKED'
                        found.append({'path':str(f),'decision':decision,'preview':txt[:1200]})
    return found

responses=find_responses()
approved=any(x['decision']=='APPROVE' for x in responses)
change_required=any(x['decision']=='CHANGE_REQUIRED' for x in responses)
blocked=any(x['decision']=='BLOCKED' for x in responses)
source=Path('governance/protocols/MULTI_AGENT_REPO_INFRASTRUCTURE_PROTOCOL_CONSOLIDATED_DRAFT.md')
source_text=read(source)
if not source_text:
    source_text=read('governance/reports/bem682_consolidated_multi_agent_infrastructure_protocol.md')
if not source_text:
    source_text='# MULTI_AGENT_REPO_INFRASTRUCTURE_PROTOCOL_CONSOLIDATED_DRAFT\n\nSource draft missing; see BEM-679/BEM-682 reports.\n'

final_candidate=Path('governance/agreements/active/bem682_final_protocol_candidate.md')
final_candidate.write_text(source_text+sep+'\n---\nStatus: ACTIVE_CANDIDATE_WAITING_CLAUDE_FINAL_DECISION\nUpdated: '+created+sep)

if approved:
    final_path=Path('governance/protocols/MULTI_AGENT_REPO_INFRASTRUCTURE_PROTOCOL_FINAL.md')
    final_path.write_text(source_text+sep+'\n---\nFinal status: APPROVED_BY_CLAUDE\nApproved at: '+created+sep)
    agreement_final=Path('governance/agreements/final/multi_agent_repo_infrastructure_protocol.md')
    agreement_final.write_text(final_path.read_text(errors='ignore'))
    status='final_protocol_approved_and_written'
    next_action='operator_final_summary_then_begin_p0_implementation'
    blocker=None
elif change_required:
    status='change_required_by_claude'
    next_action='apply_claude_changes_and_resubmit'
    blocker={'code':'CLAUDE_CHANGE_REQUIRED','responses':responses}
elif blocked:
    status='blocked_by_claude'
    next_action='resolve_claude_blocker'
    blocker={'code':'CLAUDE_BLOCKED','responses':responses}
else:
    reminder=Path('governance/audit_mailbox/gpt_to_claude/bem690_final_decision_required_repeat.md')
    reminder.write_text('# BEM-690 | FINAL DECISION REQUIRED | MULTI-AGENT INFRASTRUCTURE PROTOCOL'+sep+sep+'Дата: '+created+sep+sep+'Claude, final decision is still required for consolidated protocol.'+sep+sep+'Read:'+sep+'`governance/audit_mailbox/gpt_to_claude/bem682_consolidated_protocol_for_claude_final_approval.md`'+sep+sep+'Required response:'+sep+'```'+sep+'BEM-682 | CLAUDE FINAL DECISION'+sep+'Decision: APPROVE / CHANGE_REQUIRED / BLOCKED'+sep+'Changes: <if any>'+sep+'Blocker: <if any or null>'+sep+'```'+sep+sep+'No issue comments.'+sep)
    status='awaiting_claude_final_decision_repeat_sent'
    next_action='keep_agreement_active_and_check_mailbox_next_cycle'
    blocker=None

active_state={'schema_version':'protocol_agreement_active_state.v2','agreement_id':'BEM-682','status':status,'next_action':next_action,'responses':responses,'final_candidate':str(final_candidate),'updated_at':created,'blocker':blocker}
active_file=Path('governance/agreements/active/bem682_multi_agent_infrastructure_agreement_active.json')
active_file.write_text(json.dumps(active_state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
state={'schema_version':'continue_protocol_agreement_cycle.v1','bem':'BEM-690','status':status,'next_action':next_action,'responses':responses,'approved':approved,'change_required':change_required,'blocked':blocked,'final_candidate':str(final_candidate),'active_file':str(active_file),'blocker':blocker,'created_at':created}
state_file=Path('governance/state/bem690_continue_protocol_agreement_cycle.json')
state_file.write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
report=Path('governance/reports/bem690_continue_protocol_agreement_cycle.md')
report.write_text('# BEM-690 | Continue Protocol Agreement Cycle | '+status.upper()+sep+sep+'Дата: '+created+sep+sep+'Next action: '+next_action+sep+'Responses found: '+str(len(responses))+sep+'Final candidate: '+str(final_candidate)+sep+sep+'Blocker: '+('null' if blocker is None else json.dumps(blocker,ensure_ascii=False))+sep)
transport=Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl')
with transport.open('a',encoding='utf-8') as h:
    h.write(json.dumps({'record_type':'bem690_continue_protocol_agreement_cycle','status':status,'next_action':next_action,'responses':len(responses),'blocker':blocker,'created_at':created},ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
proof=Path('governance/codex/proofs/bem690_continue_protocol_agreement_cycle.txt')
proof.write_text('BEM-690 '+status+'\n')
changed_files.extend([str(final_candidate),str(active_file),str(state_file),str(report),str(transport),str(proof)])
if status=='awaiting_claude_final_decision_repeat_sent':
    changed_files.append('governance/audit_mailbox/gpt_to_claude/bem690_final_decision_required_repeat.md')
if status=='final_protocol_approved_and_written':
    changed_files.extend(['governance/protocols/MULTI_AGENT_REPO_INFRASTRUCTURE_PROTOCOL_FINAL.md','governance/agreements/final/multi_agent_repo_infrastructure_protocol.md'])
ops_applied.append('Continued multi-agent infrastructure protocol agreement cycle, checked Claude final decision, maintained active candidate, and sent repeat final-decision request if needed')
"""
No issue comments.
